description_long: This is a pair of black slip-on shoes with a low profile and a smooth, slightly shiny finish. The shoes have a rounded toe and a subtle seam running along the upper, with no visible laces or fasteners. The sides are plain, and the heel is slightly raised, providing a modest lift. The opening is wide, making it easy to slide the foot in and out. The shoes appear to be made primarily of synthetic leather or coated fabric, with a rubber sole for grip. The overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear.
description: A pair of black slip-on shoes with a smooth finish and plain, rounded design, featuring no laces and a slightly raised heel.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the closed heel and the wide, open entry of the shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth upper, subtle seam, and the low, flat sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded toe and the seamless, plain upper surface.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the slip-on design and the continuous, unbroken side profile.
